cards.immediateText: Cancel all effects on your opponent's card.
cards.title: Feint

cards.afterText: Draw 1 card. If you won the combat, draw 2 cards instead.
cards.title: Regroup

cards.afterText: If you won the combat, choose a fighter in the combat and move them up to 2 spaces.
cards.title: SKIRMISH

cards.duringText: If you are attacking and are adjacent to the opposing fighter, this card's value is 5 instead.
cards.title: PHYSICAL SUPERIORITY

cards.afterText: Remove the Terminator from the board (if it is your turn, end the turn). Place it on any space at the start of your next turn.
cards.title: I'LL BE BACK

cards.afterText: Deal 1 damage to each adjacent opposing fighter. If you didn't deal damage to a fighter this way, draw 1 card.
cards.title: PITILESS

cards.afterText: Your opponent reveals 2 cards from their hand. Choose 1 of them for them to discard. If you are adjacent to their fighter, they reveal 3 cards instead.
cards.title: REMORSELESS

cards.afterText: Move yourself up to 3 spaces through opposing fighters. Then if you are adjacent to an opposing fighter, gain 1 action.
cards.title: FEARLESS

cards.immediateText: You and adjacent fighters can't leave their space this turn.
cards.title: TERMINATION

cards.afterText: Shuffle 1 card with the same BOOST value as the opponent's played card from your discard into your deck.
cards.title: ADAPTATION

cards.afterText: If you won the combat, your opponent chooses to either discard 1 random card or their fighter takes 2 damage and has 0 Move this turn.
cards.title: OVERWHELMING FORCE

cards.basicText: The next time you attack this turn, if the opponent doesn't defend or their card has the same printed value as yours, deal 3 damage to their defending fighter.
cards.title: ANALYZE TARGET

cards.basicText: Look at the top 4 cards of your deck. Put 2 into your hand and then shuffle the other 2 cards back into your deck. Move up to 2 spaces (you may BOOST this movement).
cards.title: SKYNET LINK

hero.name: THE TERMINATOR
hero.specialAbility: The Terminator increases its card's attack and defense values by 1 for each copy of your opponent's played card in their discard.

sidekick.name: Sidekick
sidekick.quote: “It can't be bargained with, it can't be reasoned with. It doesn't feel pity! Or remorse or fear and it absolutely will not stop!... Ever... Until you are dead!”

name: The Terminator
note:
The Terminator is a force to be reckoned with. With a focus on positioning, the Terminator is capable of dealing heavy damage to foes in melee range, while also having the ability to fight a battle at a distance. With its machine learning, each fight that the opposing fighter engages in, the Terminator will become more and more powerful, adapting to their abilities. Unfortunately its cards are fairly low value at first and with no healing, any damage dealt to it is permanent. With good card prediction, "Analyze Target" is capable of dealing massive damage, putting strain on your opponent, and "Skynet Link" ensures you get the draws you need when you need them.

Changelog
------------
v1.6: Overpower now Overwhelm. No longer ends the turn with adjacency. On a win they either discard 1 random card or take 2 damage and have 0 Move. Was too narrow in use as you would always save them for end game and grind people out. Now they are less impactful. Fearless movement on the effect down from 4 to 3. Termination makes you immovable as well. Skynet Link movement can be BOOSTED.

v1.5: Health returned to 17 (from 16). I'll Be Back no longer returns Termination. Termination no longer cancels, and only cancels Movement/Placement effects. All Red Attack cards have their values reduced by 1 (from 5, 4, 3, 2 to 4, 3, 2, 1). Skynet Link now shuffles the deck, he had no need for bottomdeck support/knowledge. Overpower's cancel removed on the turn end.

v1.4: "Physical Superiority" only can change to a 5 on attack. Health increased to 16. "Driving Force" replaced with "Skirmish".

v1.3: Health reduced to 15. "I'll Be Back" reduced to a 2.

v1.2: "Termination" cancel only on Melee.

v1.1: "Analyze Target" no longer ignores value on success, it instead deals damage to the target so it is more balanced in terms of risk/reward as lower value cards basically did nothing. Now also works if they don't defend from it. Increased values on "Remorseless" and "Pitiless" by 1 each. "Adaptation" and "Overpower" reversed values (now 3 and 2 instead of 2 and 3 respectively).

v1.0: Created
